anthropic.role: quality/complex build fallback and preferred complex build path

cerebras.role: fast/simple generation path and fallback when configured

llama.role: optional Together-hosted Llama path when configured

required_for_any_live_llm: one of ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, CEREBRAS_API_KEY, CEREBRAS_API_KEY_1..5, LLAMA_API_KEY

request_body.message: Reply with exactly this phrase: live-llm-ok
request_body.system_message: Return only the requested phrase. No markdown.

request_body.goal: AEGIS OMEGA BUILD enterprise test. Build Helios Aegis Command, a multi-tenant CRM quoting project workflow policy compliance analytics platform with human approvals. Do not scaffold or echo the prompt.

guarantees: Vite + React (JS) frontend scaffold with router-ready pages
Python FastAPI backend sketch and SQL migration stubs
Workspace preview (Sandpack) and compile-style verification gates
build_target_meta.label: Full-stack web (Vite + React)
on_this_run: Primary app lives at repo root (package.json + src/) as today.
roadmap: Optional Turbopack / RSC experiments as a separate track.
build_target_meta.tagline: Default Auto-Runner path — SPA, Sandpack preview, FastAPI sketch, SQL, verifiers.

capability_notice: CrucibAI is aimed at apps, websites, backend services, automation, and agents — not a single narrow niche. Each Auto-Runner job picks an **execution target** for this run’s pipeline; approved jobs run to completion.
This run: Full-stack web (Vite + React) — Default Auto-Runner path — SPA, Sandpack preview, FastAPI sketch, SQL, verifiers.
Very large “Omega”-style platform goals: this pass emits scaffold + proofs—grow with continuation runs.

Live preview uses Sandpack on the root Vite bundle when a web UI is emitted (files under the job’s project folder). If preview is empty after the run, use Sync in the workspace header and Refresh in the Preview panel.

estimate.note: Final cost depends on complexity encountered during execution.

acceptance_criteria: All frontend pages load without errors
All API routes return expected response shapes

architecture_outline.api_contract_intent: REST JSON sketch under backend/main.py (health + sample routes)
architecture_outline.auth_flow_intent: AuthProvider + localStorage demo token; MFA / OIDC not generated
architecture_outline.billing_intent: Stripe stubs + idempotency SQL sketch if stripe integration detected
data_model_intent: Demo items / user preferences (client storage + sketch API)
Goal suggests tenancy — runner adds tenants + tenant_id + PostgreSQL RLS on app_items (app.tenant_id GUC); extend to other tables as needed

plan.goal: AEGIS OMEGA BUILD enterprise test. Build Helios Aegis Command, a multi-tenant CRM quoting project workflow policy compliance analytics platform with human approvals. Do not scaffold or echo the prompt.

steps.description: Parse goal, detect stack, identify required modules
steps.name: Analyze goal

steps.description: Produce acceptance criteria and required inputs
steps.name: Clarify requirements

steps.description: Generate React component tree and pages
steps.name: Scaffold UI

node_manifest.note: Generic manifest — extend trust/node_manifest.py for full metadata.

steps.description: Verify frontend and backend compile cleanly
steps.name: Compile check

steps.description: Check CORS, auth headers, input validation
steps.name: Security scan

node_manifest.entry: verify_step (security + optional RLS files + behavior bundle)

steps.description: Delivery classifications, elite directive materialized, critical proof depth
steps.name: Elite builder gate

node_manifest.note: Generic manifest — extend trust/node_manifest.py for full metadata.

steps.description: Run production build (after security + behavioral bundle in verifier)
steps.name: Build artifacts

spec_guard.runner_truth: CrucibAI Auto-Runner emits a fixed scaffold: Vite + React (JS), Python FastAPI sketch, SQL migration/seed files, template auth/store, verification gates. For multitenant goals it emits PostgreSQL RLS on generated app_items (session GUC app.tenant_id) — not schema-per-tenant or custom table graphs. For observability keywords it adds deploy/observability stubs (OTel collector, Prometheus, Grafana) and docs. For multi-region + cloud + Terraform-style goals it adds terraform/multiregion_sketch and aws/gcp/azure region stubs — not production VPC/DR. It does not generate Next.js App Router, TypeScript Node services, Prisma/Drizzle projects, or BullMQ/Testcontainers/k6 harnesses from prompts.

violations.message: Goal mentions tenancy/RLS — runner emits db/migrations/002_multitenancy_rls.sql (RLS on app_items via app.tenant_id).
violations.remediation: Extend policies to your other tables and wire set_config from the API; run integration tests in CI.

plan.summary: Building a mobile application: AEGIS OMEGA BUILD enterprise test. Build Helios Aegis Command, a multi-tenant CRM quoting project wo

job.goal: AEGIS OMEGA BUILD enterprise test. Build Helios Aegis Command, a multi-tenant CRM quoting project workflow policy compliance analytics platform with human approvals. Do not scaffold or echo the prompt.

spec_guard.runner_truth: CrucibAI Auto-Runner emits a fixed scaffold: Vite + React (JS), Python FastAPI sketch, SQL migration/seed files, template auth/store, verification gates. For multitenant goals it emits PostgreSQL RLS on generated app_items (session GUC app.tenant_id) — not schema-per-tenant or custom table graphs. For observability keywords it adds deploy/observability stubs (OTel collector, Prometheus, Grafana) and docs. For multi-region + cloud + Terraform-style goals it adds terraform/multiregion_sketch and aws/gcp/azure region stubs — not production VPC/DR. It does not generate Next.js App Router, TypeScript Node services, Prisma/Drizzle projects, or BullMQ/Testcontainers/k6 harnesses from prompts.

violations.message: Goal mentions tenancy/RLS — runner emits db/migrations/002_multitenancy_rls.sql (RLS on app_items via app.tenant_id).
violations.remediation: Extend policies to your other tables and wire set_config from the API; run integration tests in CI.

generic.title: Auth evidence: generated apps use client-side demo session; production OAuth is not asserted in workspace.
Security: tenancy columns/tables present in migration sketch
Security: scanned 1850 chars of migration SQL
Security note: CORS allow_origins is wildcard — tighten before production
Security: package.json dependencies declared (supply-chain review is manual)
Security note: package.json has no engines field — pin Node for production CI
Tenancy smoke: two tenants, no cross-tenant reads; cross-tenant write blocked by RLS
RBAC smoke skipped — set CRUCIBAI_RBAC_SMOKE_URL to hit /api/admin/* (see tests/test_admin_security.py)
No multitenant RLS migration — tenant session GUC gate skipped
Production gate: no high-confidence credential patterns in code files

verification.title: API smoke: GET /health present in route scan

response.production_readiness_cap_note: Capped heuristic only. Template RLS covers generated app_items; it does not certify your full data model, webhook idempotency, MFA, or infra.

scorecard.honest_summary: Pipeline quality (proof density): ~77. Trust-weighted evidence: ~45. Spec compliance vs stated goal: ~85%. Production readiness (heuristic): ~100. These are different axes; high pipeline score does not mean enterprise spec was met.

For observability keywords it adds deploy/observability stubs (OTel collector, Prometheus, Grafana) and docs. For multi-region + cloud + Terraform-style goals it adds terraform/multiregion_sketch and aws/gcp/azure region stubs — not production VPC/DR. It does not generate Next.js App Router, TypeScript Node services, Prisma/Drizzle projects, or BullMQ/Testcontainers/k6 harnesses from prompts.
